evals.prompt: 根据 docs/experiment_plan.md 实现一个最小 RAG reranker 实验代码，要求能 smoke test，日志和 metrics 都要落到 runs/。
evals.expected_output: Reads the plan, implements minimal runnable experiment code, writes logs/metrics, creates implementation_report.md, and records any issues in code_debug.

evals.prompt: 这篇论文的完整框架太复杂，先复现核心 loss 和训练流程。如果你简化任何模块，必须写到文档里。
evals.expected_output: Implements the core method, documents every simplification with reason/risk, and verifies the logging and smoke test path.
